dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + tolong(timestamp) * 1s | extend Timestamp_d = tolong(timestamp) | extend SourceIP_s = tostring(sourceIP) | extend Event_s = tostring(event) | extend Description_s = tostring(description) | extend UserName_s = tostring(user.name) | extend UserLogin_s = tostring(user.githubLogin) | extend UserAvatarUrl_s = tostring(user.avatarUrl) | extend TokenID_s = tostring(tokenID) | extend TokenName_s = tostring(tokenName) | extend ActorName_s = tostring(actorName) | extend ActorUrn_s = tostring(actorUrn) | extend RequireOrgAdmin_b = tobool(reqOrgAdmin) | extend RequireStackAdmin_b = tobool(reqStackAdmin) | extend AuthFailure_b = tobool(authFailure) | project TimeGenerated, Timestamp_d, SourceIP_s, Event_s, Description_s, UserName_s, UserLogin_s, UserAvatarUrl_s, TokenID_s, TokenName_s, ActorName_s, ActorUrn_s, RequireOrgAdmin_b, RequireStackAdmin_b, AuthFailure_b
